rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSEPH ARTHUR COEVILLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/13/20. Declarations filed pursuant to Probate Code Section 13100 must be conventionally filed. [LRSF 14.93 E.] The amendment filed on 2/18/20 only mentioned that a request for special notice had been filed by Edward J. Boessenecker but did not further elucidate (why no notice was given to him or who his successor-in-interest or practice administrator is, etc. An appearance will likely be required on 4/13/20 in connection with the distribution to the minor Alex Coeville; it does not appear that the administrator has contacted him or his foster parent regarding his preference for the distribution.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PEGGIE CHAPPELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Orders: 1) Nunc Pro Tunc Order To Amend Title Of Proceedings; And 2) Amendment To Order On Verified Petition Filed On April 25, 2018
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/11/2020 per counsel's request (via email 03/05/2020) to allow sufficient time for filing an inventory and appraisal (which was due on 04/09/2018) before this petition can be adjudicated. The following issues must also be addressed prior to the continued hearing date: (1) The proof of service of notice of the hearing (filed 12/31/2019) was signed on 12/31/2019, even though the date of mailing was 01/02/2020; (2) Notice of the hearing must be given to the buyer and title company. A supplemental proof of serivce must be filed; and (3) The petition does not specify any statute or case law on which the requested releif is sought and may be granted. Although the caption of the petition cites Probate Code section 8002, that statute does not appear to have any bearing on the petition.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SAMUEL V. CHONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Signature By Facsimile: Petition For Approval For Administrator To Enter Into Contingent Fee Agreement With Her Attorneys For Extraordinary Litigation Services Pursuant To Probate Code ¿ 10811
rulings.Rulings: continued to april 6, 2020 (first available date). the petition failed to include the contingency fee agreement, a material part of the petition. while filed later, the filing of a material part of a petition requires an amendment to the petition. after that amendment is filed, it must be fully noticed. POS of the NOH for the amendment to the petition must be filed no later than 3/30/20.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSE SEBASTIAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the status report is approved only as to the reasons why the estate cannot be closed. All other allegations in the report are subject to further review after a petition for final distribution is filed. The order will provide that: (1) A hearing on the status of closing the estate will be set for 07/13/2020; and (2) A corrected inventory and appraisal listing the decedent's fractional interest in the real property, and either a petition for final distribution or updated status report, must be filed by 07/06/2020. Otherwise, an appearance will be required on 07/13/2020.
